meaning: n.制作拷贝者,(尤指)临摹者,抄写员,复印机
examples: What about my copier? Can you get it going again?
At the rate it is being used, the photo copier is not going to make it through the rest of the year.
A: Please add paper to the copier.
The transformation started in 2008 with a new logo that de-emphasized its copier roots.
Last year Canon, the top copier-and-printer company, abolished automatic pay rises for anybody over 32.
